{"credits": [], "cve_id": null, "cvss": {"score": 8.8, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:H"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 8.8, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:H"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 5.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:P/PR:L/UI:N/VC:N/VI:N/VA:N/SC:H/SI:H/SA:N/E:X/CR:X/IR:X/AR:X/MAV:X/MAC:X/MAT:X/MPR:X/MUI:X/MVC:X/MVI:X/MVA:X/MSC:X/MSI:X/MSA:X/S:X/AU:X/R:X/V:X/RE:X/U:X"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-89", "name": "Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an SQL Command ('SQL Injection')"}], "description": "## Duplicate Advisory

This advisory has been withdrawn because it is a duplicate of GHSA-hwmj-qg4v-cvg9. This link is maintained to preserve external references.

## Original Description
n8n before 1.123.61, 2.x before 2.27.4, and 2.28.x before 2.28.1 contains a SQL injection vulnerability in the legacy MySQL v1 node's executeQuery operation. The operation substitutes evaluated {{ ... }} expression values directly into the raw SQL string without parameterization. When a workflow uses this operation with expression-sourced values and is connected to an externally-reachable trigger (such as a Webhook node), attacker-controlled input reaching those expressions results in SQL injection, allowing execution of arbitrary SQL with the configured MySQL credentials' privileges. The MySQL v2 node, which uses parameterized queries, is not affected.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-2qp2-6frj-p9pq", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-07-22T22:21:44Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-2qp2-6frj-p9pq", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-2qp2-6frj-p9pq"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-07-08T14:17:20Z", "published_at": "2026-07-08T15:32:02Z", "references": ["https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/security/advisories/GHSA-hwmj-qg4v-cvg9", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-59257", "https://www.vulncheck.com/advisories/n8n-sql-injection-in-mysql-v1-executequery-operation-via-expression-interpolation", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-2qp2-6frj-p9pq"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "", "summary": "Duplicate Advisory: MySQL v1 Node executeQuery Operation Allows SQL Injection via Unparameterized Expression Interpolation", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-22T22:21:46Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-2qp2-6frj-p9pq", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": null, "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "n8n"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 1.123.61"}], "withdrawn_at": "2026-07-22T22:21:44Z"}

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: Duplicate Advisory: MySQL v1 Node executeQuery Operation Allows SQL Injection via Unparameterized Expression Interpolation
